assertions.description: PCB correctly reports board_width_mm=12.7, board_height_mm=15.24 (a 0.5x0.6 inch SparkFun Qwiic-size board), copper_layers_used=2, net_count=17, routing_complete=true. The 17 nets (GND + 4xVIN + 4xVOUT + 8 unnamed internal control nets) match the schematic's 17 total nets.

footprint_count=37 includes 8 Q (transistors, SOT-23 SMD), 8 R (resistors, 0402 SMD), 2 J (connectors, 1x05 THT), 2 FID (fiducials, SMD), and decoration footprints (G3 OSHW logo, 14 kibuzzard, 1 Ref**). smd_count=18 (8Q+8R+2FID) and tht_count=2 (J1+J2) are accurate.

thermal_analysis.zone_stitching correctly identifies 2 zones: a small VOUT4 zone (1.2mm2, F.Cu only, 2 vias — likely a copper pour for a current-carrying trace) and a large GND zone (193.6mm2, F&B.Cu, 4 vias). zone_count=2 in statistics is confirmed.

layer_transitions correctly identifies VOUT1-VOUT4 each using 2 vias to transition between F.Cu and B.Cu, consistent with the board routing 4 output power lines that need both-side copper. The via positions are plausible for a densely packed 12.7x15.24mm board.

placement_analysis.density reports front_density_per_cm2=16.0 on a 1.94cm2 board. This is appropriate given 31 front-side footprints (8Q, 8R, 2FID, G3, 14 kibuzzard decoration footprints) in a small form factor, though the decoration footprints inflate this metric.

INCORRECT: placement_analysis.edge_clearance_warnings includes G3 (OSHW logo) at edge_clearance_mm=-86.99. G3 is placed at x=215.265mm which is far outside the board boundary (board spans approximately 115-128mm in X). This is a PCB-level aesthetic footprint placed at schematic coordinates, not physically on the board. The analyzer should exclude footprints placed far outside the board outline or with no pad nets from edge clearance analysis.
